playbook.intent: Run an annual planning cycle that closes the books, files taxes, sets next-year revenue / margin / hiring targets, locks the service portfolio, and surfaces compliance risks before they bite.
playbook.scope: Run an annual planning cycle that closes the books, files taxes, sets next-year revenue / margin / hiring targets, locks the service portfolio, and surfaces compliance risks before they bite.

success-criteria.criterion: All 5 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Close the Books
stage.intent: Get last-year's numbers final and clean.

tasks.task: Reconcile all invoices, expenses, and contractor payouts
Run end-of-year tax-and-legal close with your accountant
Lock the books and snapshot the P&L

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when books are closed and P&L is signed off.

stage.name: Compute Capacity & Margin
stage.intent: Know what you actually have to invest.

tasks.task: Compute capacity in billable hours and ICP-day-rate
Compute net margin per offering and per client
Decide which offerings to grow, hold, or drop

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every offering has a documented grow/hold/drop call.

stage.name: Set Annual Plan

tasks.task: Set 3-5 annual outcomes with measurable targets
Pre-commit capacity and budget per outcome

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every outcome has a quarterly milestone and budgeted capacity.

stage.name: Re-price & Renew

tasks.task: Decide which clients get a rate adjustment this quarter
Send adjustment notices with enough notice to be fair
Sign renewed retainers / scopes at the new rates

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when adjustment notices are out AND renewals start landing.

stage.name: Kickoff & Communicate
stage.intent: Tell the team and clients what changed.

tasks.task: Hold the all-hands annual kickoff covering plan and changes
Send client newsletter or 1:1s with anything that affects them
Set the quarterly review cadence on the calendar

stage.decision-gate: Required output: every active client has been told what changed.
